title: [Bug]: CryptoPkg cannot be built with VS2022
reason: A build failure in CryptoPkg with VS2022 blocks all users of that compiler, similar to the previous 'Encountering a build error with the CLANG compiler' in CryptoPkg which was labeled high.

title: [Bug]: ECC Check Silently Fails in edk2 CI for Windows and Linux

title: [Bug]: BSP could free AP reset vector buffer even though AP wake up is in process
reason: A race condition where the BSP frees the AP reset vector buffer while APs are still using it during wake-up could cause crashes or data corruption during CPU initialization, which is a critical firmware stability issue with no clear workaround.

title: [Bug]: Encountering a build error with the CLANG compiler.
reason: Similar to 'CryptoPkg cannot be built with VS2022' which was labeled medium, this is a build failure limited to a specific compiler (CLANG) rather than blocking all configurations for all users.

title: [Bug]: UEFI runtime drivers loaded after EndOfDxe are not executable by OS
reason: This is a functional bug where UEFI runtime drivers loaded after EndOfDxe lack executable permissions for the OS, which has a workaround (load drivers before EndOfDxe) and affects a specific configuration rather than all users.

title: [Bug]: TCG2/TPM2 support on RISC-V does not work
reason: TCG2/TPM2 support not working on RISC-V is a functional bug affecting a specific platform/architecture combination, similar to the 'qemu-kvm GUEST start failed on RISC-V' issue labeled medium, with a workaround possible by not using TPM features.

title: [Bug]: Potential infinite loop and incorrect DeviceList handling in OpalPassword
reason: A potential infinite loop in OpalPassword handling is a functional bug that could cause system hangs, but it requires specific device conditions to trigger and has no direct security exploitation path in the UEFI threat model, making it medium severity similar to other functional bugs with workarounds.
